description: Wood elves are more reclusive than high elves but less so than wild elves. They dwell in deep forests and are excellent woodsmen. They have a stronger connection to nature than their high elf kin.

class_options.note: Wood elves may be Rangers (unlike high elves).

level_limits.note: Wood elves have slightly lower magic-user limits than high elves but can be rangers.

sleep_charm_resistance.description: 90% resistant to sleep and charm spells.

bow_sword_bonus.description: +1 to hit with bows and short/long swords.

surprise_bonus.description: Surprise opponents on 4 in 6 when alone or with other elves/halflings, not in metal armor.

woodland_abilities.description: Wood elves have enhanced abilities in forested areas. They can pass through overgrown areas without trace and have a natural affinity for woodland creatures.
woodland_abilities.animal_empathy: Wood elves can calm and befriend woodland animals.
